applyTo: "[FILL IN — e.g., apps/frontend/** or src/client/**]"

# Architecture & Commands Context

## Repository Structure

- Repo type: [FILL IN — e.g., monorepo with npm workspaces: apps/* and packages/*]
- Frontend: [FILL IN — e.g., React + TypeScript + Vite under apps/frontend]
- Backend: [FILL IN — e.g., Node + Express + Prisma under apps/backend]
- Shared packages: [FILL IN — e.g., packages/shared-types and packages/shared-constants]
- Backend architecture: [FILL IN — e.g., Clean Architecture: api -> core -> infrastructure]
- Frontend organization: [FILL IN — e.g., feature-based under src/features]
- Database: [FILL IN — e.g., PostgreSQL through Prisma]
- Cache: [FILL IN — e.g., Redis with fail-open behavior or N/A]

## Commands

- Install: [FILL IN — e.g., npm install]
- Dev server: [FILL IN — e.g., npm run dev]
- Build: [FILL IN — e.g., npm run build]
- Test all: [FILL IN — e.g., npm test]
- Test frontend: [FILL IN — e.g., npm run test --workspace=@your-org/frontend]
- Test backend: [FILL IN — e.g., npm run test --workspace=@your-org/backend]
- Lint: [FILL IN — e.g., npm run lint]
- Type check: [FILL IN — e.g., tsc --noEmit]
